'''Colony Three''' was a colony [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. It was located on the shore of the [[Ocean/Legends|oceanic]] [[Zoma Gawanga]], south of [[Peace City|Colony One]] and [[Colony Two]]. It was [[Raid on Colony Three|attacked]] by the [[Corellian Resistance/Legends|Corellian Resistance]] in [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]].
